Headline: #9 Ashland Temporary Reroute at Ashland/43rd
ShortDescription: #9 Ashland buses are temp. rerouted in both directions via Ashland, 43rd, Western, 47th and Ashland over normal route due to street blockage at Ashland/43rd.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#9 Ashland buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Ashland, 43rd, Western, 47th and Ashland over normal route due to street blockage near Ashland/43rd.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #34 South Michigan Temporary Reroute at Indiana/127th
ShortDescription: #34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 127th, Indiana, 134th, Langley and 131st over the normal route.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#34 South Michigan buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 127th, Indiana, 134th, Langley and 131st over the normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Indiana/127th.

Headline: Northbound #50 Damen Temporary Reroute near  Damen/18th
ShortDescription: Northbound #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, 18th, Ashland, Roosevelt and Damen then resume their normal route.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

Northbound #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Damen, 18th, Ashland, Roosevelt and Damen then resume their normal route.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near Damen/18th.

Allow extra travel time.
